scripts.dev:db:restart: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5432 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1" && npm run dev:db
scripts.dev:stack:restart: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5432,4000,3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"
scripts.db:push: cd backend && npx prisma db push
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
